zh.lifeSummary: 當Mahaut Matilde de Clermont於大約1140年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯奧易可勒爾蒙特時，她的父親Renaud de Clermont II60歲，母親Clemence de Bar31歲。她於1166年與Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II在英國巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1200年9月19日在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾希索普享年61歲，埋葬在法國o-阿爾培斯艾朋提額。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mahaut Matilde de Clermont于大约1140年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯奧易可勒爾蒙特时，她的父亲Renaud de Clermont II60岁，母亲Clemence de Bar31岁。她于1166年与Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II在英国巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1200年9月19日在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾希索普享年61岁，埋葬在法国o-阿爾培斯艾朋提額。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clermont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Georges, Normand, Pierre, Armand, Edouard, Gaston, Ghislaine, Gilles, Henri, Herve, Jean Francois.

French and English (Middlesex, of Norman and French Huguenot origin): habitational name from any of various places in France called (Le) Clermont, from Old French clair, cler ‘bright, clear’ + mont ‘hill’, i.e. a hill that could be seen a long way off. Compare Clairmont .

English (Middlesex, of Norman and possibly also Huguenot origin): variant of Claremont, from the Old French female personal name Claremonde, supposedly from ancient Germanic Claremunda, a hybrid compound of Latin clarus ‘famous’ + ancient Germanic mund ‘protection’.

variants.name: Clairmont
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adelard, Aime, Antoine, Aurore, Fernand.
French: variant of Clermont and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Clairmont is very rare in France.
In some cases possibly also English: variant of Claremont or Clermont . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Matilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mahaut Matilde de Clermont was born about 1140, in Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Renaud de Clermont II, was 60 and her mother, Clemence de Bar, was 31. She married Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II in 1166, in Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 19 September 1200, in Sibthorpe, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Ponthieu, Ain, Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mahaut Matilde de Clermont est née environ 1140, à Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Renaud de Clermont II, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Clemence de Bar, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II en 1166, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 septembre 1200, à Sibthorpe, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Ponthieu, Ain, Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mahaut Matilde de Clermont um 1140 in Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Renaud de Clermont II 60 und ihre Mutter Clemence de Bar 31. Sie hat 1166 in Buckinghamshire, England Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. September 1200 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Sibthorpe, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ponthieu, Ain, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mahaut Matilde de Clermont è nata il circa 1140 nel Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Renaud de Clermont II, aveva 60 anni e sua madre, Clemence de Bar, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II nel 1166, nel Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 19 settembre 1200, nel Sibthorpe, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Ponthieu, Ain, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mahaut Matilde de Clermontが約1140年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスオイゼクラーモントで生まれた時，父Renaud de Clermont IIは60歳，母Clemence de Barは31歳であった。1166年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでAubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1200年9月19日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアシブソルペで61歳で死去し，フランスルhoネ-アルペスエインポンスイエウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mahaut Matilde de Clermont(이)가 대략 1140년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 이스 클레몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Renaud de Clermont II(은)는 60세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Clemence de Bar(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1166년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1200년 9월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 시브소에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 ho니-알프스 언 폰스이외에 묻혔다.

mn.Sibthorpe, Nottinghamshire,England: Sibthorpe, Snotengaham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mahaut Matilde de Clermont nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Renaud de Clermont II, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Clemence de Bar, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II em 1166, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de setembro de 1200, em Sibthorpe, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Ponthieu, Ain, Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mahaut Matilde de Clermont родилась около 1140 г. в местности клирмонт, оис, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Renaud de Clermont II было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Clemence de Bar, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II в 1166 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 19 сентября 1200 г. в местности сибтаурп, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности понтиеу, эин, рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mahaut Matilde de Clermont nació aproximadamente 1140, en Clermont, Oise, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Renaud de Clermont II, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Clemence de Bar, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Aubry Sieur of Lillebonne and Mello II en 1166, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 19 de septiembre de 1200, en Sibthorpe, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Ponthieu, Ain, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
